summary: Complete testing of NEW payment features: auto-email on payment creation, payment stats endpoint, redesigned payment page, and stats cards in admin UI. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with redesigned payment page (cream background #F5F2EB, slate grey header #6B7B8C, golfinmallorca.com branding) and admin payments tab with stats summary cards.

backend_payment_stats.details: Returns total_requests, paid_count, pending_count, total_collected, total_pending

backend_auto_email.details: Backend logs confirm 'Payment link email sent to' for all created payments

backend_stripe_checkout.details: Stripe checkout session creation and status polling working

frontend_payment_page_redesign.details: Cream background (#F5F2EB), slate grey header (#6B7B8C), logo with mix-blend-mode, 'golfinmallorca.com' text, Pay button

frontend_payment_not_found.details: Shows 'Payment Not Found' error page with back link

frontend_admin_stats_cards.details: Three cards: Collected (€0.00, 0 paid), Pending (€925.00, 3 awaiting), Total (3 requests)

frontend_admin_create_form.details: All fields present, 'Create & Send Link' button, email note visible

frontend_admin_payment_list.details: Status badges (PENDING, INITIATED), service type badges, amounts, copy/open/delete buttons

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/payment-stats - stats consistent with payments list
Frontend: Payment page redesign verified (cream bg, slate header, logo, branding)
Frontend: Invalid payment ID shows error page
Frontend: Admin stats cards display correctly
Frontend: Admin create form with 'Create & Send Link' button
critical_code_review_comments: Payment stats endpoint correctly aggregates from payment_transactions collection
Auto-email uses asyncio.create_task for non-blocking email sending
PaymentPage.jsx properly handles all states: loading, error, success, polling
PaymentsTab.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Email templates use consistent branding with logo_email_v2.jpg

test_credentials.note: Reused from iteration_20 for admin dashboard access

seed_data_creation: Test payments created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment features fully tested. NEW features verified: 1) Auto-email on payment creation (check backend logs for 'Payment link email sent'), 2) GET /api/admin/payment-stats returns {total_requests, paid_count, pending_count, total_collected, total_pending}, 3) Payment page redesigned with cream bg (#F5F2EB), slate header (#6B7B8C), golfinmallorca.com branding, 4) Admin PaymentsTab has stats summary cards (Collected, Pending, Total), 'Create & Send Link' button, email note. Existing payments in DB: vh5xif0w (€50, initiated), clsl6u2p (€850, pending), aft27n7q (€25, pending). Key data-testids: payments-tab, payment-stats, stat-collected, stat-pending, stat-total, create-payment-btn, payment-form, payment-name, payment-email, payment-amount, submit-payment-btn, payment-search, payment-row-{id}, pay-now-btn, payment-page, payment-success.
